body_preview:
Hello,

Attached are the forms we need back completed in order to change your status from “adult” to “Live in Aid”. Once the reasonable accommodation and Subsidy Standard Exception forms are submitted, they need to be approved, and once it is approved we can update the status.

Ashley Glass
Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
503-802-8315
[Logo  Description automatically generated]

If you need to report any household or income changes, you can download documents from the participant portal at
https://portal.homeforward.org/Forms/Participant

You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service window.
The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM – noon and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street

From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, April 1, 2026 10:51 AM
To: Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
Subject: Re: Additional Information Needed


🛑  CAUTION: This email is NOT from a Home Forward email address. Do NOT click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe. Home Forward does NOT have a "Safe Sender" list. :CAUTION  🛑
Okay that is fine please do that

On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:48 AM Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org<mailto:Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>> wrote:
Hello,

You are correct that a live in aids income is not counted so it would not be relevant, but you’re not listed as a live in aid. The paperwork we received from Clackamas County lists you as just an adult in the household. I can send over the forms and we can get the updated though, just let me know and I will email them over.

Ashley Glass
Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
